summary: The Alaska House of Representatives is asking the Trump administration and Canadian government to step back from a brewing trade war. title: Volcanic Ashfall Preparedness
summary: How to Stay Safe Before, During, and After an Ashfall Event Volcanic ash can be dangerous to people, animals, and buildings. Volcanic ash is mostly made up of tiny pieces […] The post Volcanic Ashfall Preparedness first appeared on Chugachmiut .

title: Why the Kenai River Is a Year-Round Destination — Not Just for Summer
summary: The Kenai River is known around the world for its peak salmon season — but what many visitors don’t realize is that this river offers something every month of the year . From quiet winter wildlife sightings to spring scouting floats and late-season trophy trout, the Kenai is more than just a summer...

title: AST Wildlife Violation: WASILLA [AK25029295]
summary: On 03-30-2025, KAYSON COMERFORD (19yo) was contacted at the Little Susitna River near Schrock Rd in Wasilla, AK. He admitted to driving a motorized highway vehicle across the river, which is a salmon spawning stream. Comerford was issued a citation with a mandatory court date.
